label: List connected devices
description: Shows the Android devices ADB can see, with their state.

label: Device identity / build info
description: Reads the device's identity and build details via turboadb.

label: Connect a wireless device (TCP/IP)
description: Connects to an Android device over the network (wireless ADB).

label: Wait for device online
description: Blocks until a device is online — useful right after a reboot.

label: Run any shell command
description: Runs an adb shell command and shows its output.

label: Shell command, expect text
description: Runs a shell command and passes only if the output contains the expected text.

label: Run command & attach output
description: Runs a command and attaches the full output (e.g. dumpsys) to the report.

label: Android version
description: Reads the Android OS version (ro.build.version.release).

label: Build ID
description: Reads the build ID (ro.build.id).

label: Build fingerprint
description: Reads the full build fingerprint.

label: Serial number
description: Reads the device serial number (ro.serialno).

label: Check boot completed
description: Passes when sys.boot_completed is 1 — i.e. the device has finished booting.

label: List 3rd-party packages
description: Lists user-installed (non-system) app packages.

label: Check a package is installed
description: Passes if the named package appears in the installed list.

label: Install an APK
description: Installs (or reinstalls) an APK onto the device.

label: Uninstall a package
description: Removes an app package from the device.

label: Start an app activity
description: Launches a specific app activity.

label: Force-stop an app
description: Force-stops a running app.

label: Clear app data
description: Wipes an app's data and cache (pm clear).

label: Broadcast an intent
description: Sends a broadcast intent to the system/app.

label: Push a file to the device
description: Copies a local file onto the device.

label: Pull a file from the device
description: Copies a file off the device to the host.

label: Clear logcat buffer
description: Flushes the logcat buffers so the next capture starts clean.

label: Capture logcat → attach
description: Dumps logcat and attaches the full log to the report.

label: Capture logcat for a tag
description: Dumps logcat filtered to one tag and attaches it.

label: Screenshot (PNG)
description: Captures the device screen as a PNG and attaches it to the report.

label: Screen recording (10s)
description: Records the device screen for a few seconds and attaches the video.

label: Tap the screen (x, y)
description: Sends a tap at the given screen coordinates.

label: Swipe the screen
description: Sends a swipe gesture between two points.

label: Press HOME
description: Sends the HOME key.

label: Press BACK
description: Sends the BACK key.

label: Type text
description: Types a string into the focused field.

label: Battery status → attach
description: Dumps battery info and attaches it to the report.

label: Memory info → attach
description: Dumps memory info and attaches it to the report.

label: CPU top snapshot
description: One-shot top to see current CPU/process load.

label: Current focused activity
description: Shows which activity currently has focus.

label: Wi-Fi state
description: Shows whether Wi-Fi is enabled on the device.

label: Keep screen awake
description: Keeps the screen on while plugged in (svc power stayon).

label: Remount /system read-write (root)
description: Remounts /system as writable (needs root).

label: Remount /vendor read-write (root)
description: Remounts /vendor as writable (needs root).

label: Show mounts
description: Lists the device's mounted filesystems.

label: Check /data is mounted rw
description: Passes if /data is mounted read-write.

label: Remount /system read-only (root)
description: Remounts /system back to read-only (needs root).

label: Reboot device
description: Reboots the device normally.

label: Reboot to bootloader
description: Reboots the device into the bootloader/fastboot.
